raw_consumer_statement: I am writing to formally dispute the remaining unauthorized charges on my account. I did not authorize these transactions, did not benefit from them, and was not in possession of my card for these purchases. The fraudulent activity first appeared on my XXXX statement, and I reported it promptly once I became aware of the issue. At no time did I receive any fraud alerts or notifications from the credit card company indicating suspicious activity. Had I been notified, I would have acted immediately. I respectfully request a full review of the remaining disputed charges and reimbursement in accordance with your XXXX-liability policy for unauthorized transactions.
